prompts: Roll the dice
Your move — roll the dice!
Fate awaits — give the dice a shake
Tap the dice and let luck decide
Ready? Roll for your next field
The board is calling — roll the dice
Send the dice flying
One roll away from adventure
Spin those pixels of destiny
Roll to see where you land
Shake the dice and start your turn
Let the dice pick your path
Time to roll — the festival waits
Hit the dice and chase the next station
Your next field is one roll away
Roll now — the crowd is watching
Dice up! See how far you go
Take a chance — roll the dice
The die is cast… well, almost — roll it!
Fortune favors the bold — roll the dice

rules.title: Game rules
rules.p1: One phone per team. Roll the dice, find your spot, scan the QR, complete the task, then lock in your turn.
rules.p2: Hints cost points. Waiting unlocks cheaper hints. Reveal all hints costs 50 points.
rules.p3: If you cannot find the spot, use Roll again (zero round) after all hints are available — no progress, no points.
rules.p4: Highscore counts only for teams that reach the final field. Fastest finish breaks ties.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.intro: These notices apply to the “Zugvögel” festival field game (web app). They supplement the privacy policy of Zugvögel e.V. for the festival website.
privacy.controllerBody:
Zugvögel e.V.
Poller Kirchweg 124
51105 Köln, Germany
Email: abflug{'@'}zugvoegelfestival.org
privacy.purposeBody: The app lets you take part in the field game during a festival edition: create a team, roll dice, find stations via QR, complete tasks, earn points, and view the leaderboard. We do not use the app for advertising.
privacy.dataTeam: Team name, optional motto, team size, and chosen avatar (illustration, not personal photos).
privacy.dataGame: Game state: field position, completed stations, rolls, tasks, hints, quiz answers, points, crew ratings for performance tasks, and co-op links between teams.
privacy.dataAuth: Four-digit PIN stored only as a cryptographic hash; session cookie (httpOnly) for login on one device per team.
privacy.dataMedia: For media tasks: photos or videos you upload (including metadata such as filename, size, duration). Festival crew may view submissions for rating.
privacy.dataTech: Technical: IP address briefly in memory for abuse protection (rate limiting); language preference stored locally in the browser.
privacy.publicBody: Team name, avatar, motto (if provided), points, and progress appear on the live leaderboard and team directory for other teams in the same edition.
privacy.cameraBody: The camera is used in the browser for QR scans. Image data is not stored on our servers unless you explicitly upload it for a media task.
privacy.cookiesBody: We use a technically necessary session cookie (team_session, httpOnly, up to 48 hours) to keep you signed in. Language choice is stored locally in the browser. No tracking or marketing cookies.
privacy.legalBasisBody: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (performance of game participation), Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interests in operation, abuse protection, and public leaderboard). Media uploads are voluntary as part of tasks.
privacy.retentionBody: Data is kept for the duration of the festival edition and a reasonable period afterwards, unless statutory retention obligations apply. Data is then deleted. No newsletters or marketing emails via the app.
privacy.recipientsBody: Authorized festival crew and administrators have access. Technical implementation by ma:nü on behalf of Zugvögel e.V. on infrastructure operated for the event. No sharing with third parties for advertising.
privacy.rightsBody: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection, and data portability. Contact abflug{'@'}zugvoegelfestival.org or the festival info desk. You may withdraw consent (e.g. media uploads) by not uploading further or requesting deletion.
privacy.complaintBody: You may lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority, e.g. the State Commissioner for Data Protection and Freedom of Information of North Rhine-Westphalia (LDI NRW), Germany.
privacy.externalBody: The general privacy policy of Zugvögel (website, shop, newsletter, etc.) is available at

impressum.title: Legal notice
impressum.representatives: Wolfgang Schadow, Tobias Kirchgatter, Carsten Kugele
impressum.register:
Court: Amtsgericht Köln (Cologne)
Registration no.: VR 18917
impressum.appBody: This progressive web app (“Zugvögel”) is operated as part of the Zugvögel festival. Responsible for content under § 18(2) MStV: Zugvögel e.V. (address as above).
impressum.implementationBody: ma:nü on behalf of Zugvögel e.V. / Zugvögel Festival
impressum.liabilityBody: As a service provider we are responsible for our own content under general law. We do not guarantee external linked content; respective operators are solely responsible.
